description:
You are an online merchant who has just signed up with a third-party fulfillment warehouse. To complete the integration, configure a webhook in your WooCommerce store with the following settings:

- Name: Fulfillment Dispatch - New Orders
- Status: Active
- Topic: Order created
- Delivery URL: https://hooks.fulfillment-partner.example.com/wc/orders
- Secret: fh8K2mNpQx7vR4wT
